form.formComment: Second run back. First-up after two months 10th of 13 at Bendigo Mdn-Sw on March 27 over 1600m, 5.5 len behind Shipstern Bluff carrying 59.5kg at $61. Previously second-up 4th of 10 at Horsham Mdn-Sw on December 21 over 1800m, on a slow track; 3.5 len behind Star Of Rossa with 59.5kg at $5. No easier this time and happy to leave out.

form.formComment: Filly back from a spell of eight months. Has placed previously first up from a break. Finished off last preparation seventh of 18 at Chukyo 3yo Mdn Wfa August 16 over 2200m, 5.5 len behind Terpsichora with 55.0kg at $9.40. Previously first up; third of 16 at Kyoto October 12 2024 over 1600m, 1.1 len behind Dragon Boost with 55.0kg at $13.90. Former Japanese maiden who has placed 2/2 fresh and has the best overall figure so expected to measure up.
